lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Inara — Engineers
sources.what: Engineer unlock requirements, hand-in items, locations, and referral order driving the checklist phases.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Fandom Wiki
sources.what: Engineer unlock mechanics, invite prerequisites, reputation-tier modifications cross-check, and the engineer portrait images used in the unlock map.

sources.label: NEWP — Engineering Guide
sources.what: Ship-engineer unlock walkthrough and recommended order — cross-checked against the Phase 2–4 steps.

sources.label: NEWP — Odyssey Engineering
sources.what: On-foot engineer unlocks and the post-Aug-2024 mission-reward item drops behind the Odyssey phase.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Engineer roster, blueprint grades, and unlock prerequisites cross-reference.

sources.label: EDEngineer
sources.what: Material and unlock-item cross-checks for the prep and farm steps.

sources.label: EDSM
sources.what: Engineer base systems and permit-locked destinations (Sol, Sirius, Alioth, Colonia) for the route planning.
